channel.title: Claude Developer Misery Index
channel.description: Real-time Claude AI reliability tracking — misery score, API status, and incident alerts. Updated every 15 minutes.

item.title: Misery Index: 3.0/10 — MINOR GRUMBLING
item.description: Score: 3.0/10 (MINOR GRUMBLING). Status: All Systems Operational.

item.title: [MAJOR] Elevated errors on multiple models
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Degraded performance for Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This issue has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MINOR] Sonnet 4.5 elevated errors
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: minor. Latest: This incident has been resolved.
